case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION VS. JABER ALI

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $170.50 FILED BY SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION AS TO DEFENDANT ALI, JABER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-19-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-23-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 (MULTIPLE CASES, 8/19/19 RESERVED) TRIAL OF SEP-19-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) TYLER HOLLINGSWORTH, EMPLOYEE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEALTH CARE AND REHABILITATION
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-14-2019 AT 1:30 P.M. DEPT. 506. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HEATLH CARE AND REHABILATION, REPRESENTED BY TYLER HOLLINGSWORTH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JABER ALI IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
